word: G1517 - εἰρηνοποιέω - eirēnopoiéō - i-ray-nop-oy-eh'-o - Make peace

sections.paragraph:
- Original: εἰρηνοποιέω

- Transliteration: Eirenopoieo

- Phonetic: i-ray-nop-oy-eh'-o

- Definition:

1. to make peace, establish harmony

- Origin: from G1518

- TDNT entry: 08:59,2

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1518; to be a peace maker that is (figuratively) to harmonize: - make peace.
